column3: Hoax post claims the state banned electricity after 8 PM.
Viral rumor says hospitals were told to hide all cancer treatments.
Fabricated claim says the election office deleted legal ballots.
False alert says the water authority will poison reservoirs tomorrow.
Official statistics showed exports increased during the first quarter.
The transportation agency confirmed the rail line reopened on schedule.
Public health officials reported a decline in seasonal flu admissions.
The inspector general said the audit found no missing grant funds.
